_doc: Committed regression floors for the Phase 5 CI gate (eval/regression_gate.py). The gate reads the named report + the deterministic grounding stress test and fails the build (exit 1) if any metric crosses its threshold. Thresholds are set with headroom below the measured value so ordinary run-to-run noise does not flap the build, but a real regression (weakened grounding, lost significance, abstain-on-everything) trips it. Update deliberately, with the report that justifies the change, never to make a red build pass.

gates.desc: corrupted quotes rejected / corrupted quotes tested; the faithfulness floor, must be 100%
genuine grounded quotes wrongly rejected; must be 0
verified-arm hallucinated-citation proxy; measured 0.0084, ceiling well above noise
faithfulness A/B must stay significant; measured 0.0193
verified must cut unsupported rate by at least 30%; measured -0.8842
guard against a regression that abstains on everything to fake faithfulness; measured 0.2671
every live prompt registered and no frozen (v1/v2) prompt text has drifted from its recorded hash
